source: Gasperini et al. 2019 CRISPRi x ARCHCODE Q2b
interpretation: ZERO overlap between Q2b HBB variants and Gasperini 2019 CRISPRi elements. Although 415 enhancer-gene pairs were tested in the broader HBB region (chr11:5.15-5.35Mb), the nearest gRNA target to Q2b positions is HBD_TSS at ~29kb distance. No element was tested within 5kb of the Q2b variant cluster (chr11:5,226,596-5,227,172). This is because HBB is silenced in K562 cells -- the screen used K562 which expresses embryonic/fetal globins (epsilon, gamma) but not adult beta-globin. The positive controls in the dataset confirm this: they target LCR hypersensitive sites (HS1-HS4) and HBE1 promoter, not HBB. CONCLUSION: Q2b variants in the HBB promoter/coding region represent a genuine gap in experimental CRISPRi validation. Validating these would require CRISPRi in adult erythroid progenitors (e.g., HUDEP-2 cells), not K562.

gap_analysis.note: The nearest CRISPRi target site to Q2b variants is HBD_TSS at ~29kb away. No gRNA was targeted within 5kb of the Q2b variant cluster (chr11:5,226,596-5,227,172). This region contains HBB promoter and coding variants. The Gasperini 2019 screen included HBD_TSS but NOT HBB_TSS, consistent with HBB being silenced in K562 cells. The positive controls (HS1-HS4, HBE1_tss) target the LCR and embryonic globin, confirming the screen focused on K562-expressed genes.
